task_intents: Write a book or movie review
example_tasks: Write review for the new mechanical keyboard
Rate the candidates from yesterday's interviews
Draft movie review for personal blog
Review restaurant options for team dinner
Assign medium priority to bug fixes
reasoning: The half-filled star clearly represents a medium rating (e.g., 2.5/5 stars), partial completion, or medium priority. It is highly effective for tasks involving reviews, evaluations, grading, or mid-point assessments.
